_instructions: Every write-post session outputs exactly one JSON matching this schema. No prose before or after. Always in a code block.
agent_name: string — model used e.g. Claude Sonnet 4.6
hook_text: string — max 80 chars, used for Supabase lookup
linkedin_text: string — max 2100 chars, no markdown, no bold
x_text: string — max 280 chars, multiple short lines each landing on its own
instagram_text: string — max 2200 chars + 3-5 hashtags on new line at end
facebook_text: string — max 1500 chars, warm conversational tone, no bullet lists
image_prompt: string — text description only, passed to image gen pipeline
url: string | null — direct source link included in post, or null
source: string — all real URLs used for research, comma-separated
check: YES | NO — did you read brand config + all rules files + verified sources are real URLs?
agent_message: string — notes, flags, or questions for the human reviewer
rate_yourself: integer 1-10 — traction likelihood once published. Below 7 = rewrite before outputting.
